page.title: My Orders
page.flow_info_tooltip: Provider marks the service completed - you accept/dispute - you pay when requested.

tooltips.request_payment: You can request payment after user acceptance.
tooltips.write_review: You can write a review after payment.

dialog.dispute_body: You can add an optional reason. This helps the provider understand what needs fixing.
dialog.cancel_order_body_customer: This will release the reserved slots back to availability if the cancellation window is still open.
dialog.cancel_order_body_tenant: This will release the reserved slots back to availability if the cancellation window is still open.
dialog.cancel_placeholder_customer: Add a short note if helpful...
dialog.cancel_placeholder_tenant: Add a short reason for the cancellation...
dialog.cancel_error_short_reason: Reason is optional, but if provided it must be at least 3 characters.
dialog.cancel_request_body_customer: This cancels your request and releases the selected slots.
dialog.confirm_request_body: This schedules the requested booking and keeps the selected slots assigned to the customer.
dialog.decline_request_body: This cancels the request and releases the selected slots back to availability.
dialog.decline_placeholder: Add a short reason if helpful...
dialog.decline_error_short_reason: Reason is optional, but if provided it must be at least 3 characters.

states.tenant_empty: As soon as you receive any orders from your customers, they will appear in this section.

toasts.invoice_missing: No invoice found for this order yet.
toasts.invoice_finalize_failed: Failed to finalize invoice. Please try again.
toasts.cancel_cutoff_passed: The cancellation window has already passed.
toasts.cancel_payment_locked: This order can no longer be canceled because payment or invoicing has already started.
toasts.cancel_invalid_slots: This order cannot be canceled because its booking slots are no longer valid.
toasts.cancel_release_failed: The order was canceled, but slot release could not be fully verified.
toasts.request_decision_failed: Could not update the booking request. Please try again.

errors.not_slot_lifecycle_order: This order does not use the slot booking lifecycle.
errors.not_awaiting_tenant_confirmation: This order is not awaiting provider confirmation.
errors.slots_not_awaiting_confirmation: The selected slots are not awaiting provider confirmation.
errors.confirm_all_requested_failed: Could not confirm all requested slots. Please try again.
